message:
chore(recorder-storage): clarify frankensqlite backend deserialize error

The prior error message ("frankensqlite backend not yet implemented,
use append_log") was written when the backend was an unimplemented
stub. It's now a real backend gated behind the `frankensqlite-recorder`
cargo feature, so the message misdirects operators who hit a config
that references the backend in a build where the feature simply wasn't
enabled — they think the backend doesn't exist, rather than "rebuild
with the feature on".

Update the text to cite the actual root cause: either enable the
`frankensqlite-recorder` cargo feature or switch the config to
`append_log`. Pure message-text change; no behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
